# First Viewport Rule

The first viewport must make the subject inspectable.

## Required Signal

At least one must be clear without scrolling:

- product or object;
- place or venue;
- offer or category;
- brand or person;
- primary action.

## Avoid

- Split text/media layouts where the real subject is trapped in a decorative card.
- Gradient-only or SVG-only hero sections when a real visual would clarify the page.
- Hero text in a card when the page is brand, product, venue, portfolio, or object-focused.
- Mobile hero blocks that fill the entire viewport without hinting at the next section.

## Verification

Check desktop and mobile first viewport. Confirm the next section is hinted and text does not overlap.
